raw.subject: Foodie Friday in Clovis; Something I noticed about Hungry Hound
raw.body:
Hi,

I'm glad to see you're participating in Foodie Friday at C&S in Clovis - I've been there and loved the variety of options. Your posts always give me a good appetite!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on potential bookings and calls from customers who can't easily find you online.

I took a closer look at the great photos and posts you share on Facebook, and I thought I'd sketch out a simple homepage idea that could help people find you and your delicious hotdogs more easily. The idea includes a menu hero section to showcase your specialties, a block for your hours and contact info, a photo gallery to share more of your creations, and a map to help visitors find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/hungry-hound-llc-clovis

If you'd like to discuss how to make this a reality, I'd be happy to provide a simple and straightforward quote for a flat fee for local businesses like yours. Just reply to this email or let's schedule a quick call to chat about it.
